prompt:
Ultra-cinematic close-up portrait of a young woman sitting inside a dark urban café, photographed from outside through a large reflective glass window. She has a sleek chin-length black bob with a center part, soft loose strands falling naturally across her face, pale realistic skin with subtle freckles, light green-gray eyes, soft natural lips, minimal makeup, and a quiet, distant, melancholic expression. She wears an elegant all-black outfit with sheer black sleeves.
Her face is visible beneath multiple layers of glass reflections: blue streaks from passing cars, blurred city buildings, warm orange lights, street silhouettes and abstract urban shapes flowing across the frame. The reflections partially obscure her face, creating a dreamy double-exposure effect. Warm golden-hour sunlight gently cuts across sections of her face and glossy hair while the café interior remains dark and atmospheric.
Intimate candid composition, subject looking sideways or subtly toward the camera, natural unposed body language, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic glass scratches and faint dust, soft lens flare, subtle highlight bloom, cool blue reflections mixed with warm amber tones, rich blacks, cinematic color grading, 85mm lens, f/1.4, Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, soft halation, natural skin texture, poetic urban solitude, luxury fashion editorial meets documentary street photography, photorealistic, vertical 4:5, no text, no watermark.
promptEn:
Ultra-cinematic close-up portrait of a young woman sitting inside a dark urban café, photographed from outside through a large reflective glass window. She has a sleek chin-length black bob with a center part, soft loose strands falling naturally across her face, pale realistic skin with subtle freckles, light green-gray eyes, soft natural lips, minimal makeup, and a quiet, distant, melancholic expression. She wears an elegant all-black outfit with sheer black sleeves.
Her face is visible beneath multiple layers of glass reflections: blue streaks from passing cars, blurred city buildings, warm orange lights, street silhouettes and abstract urban shapes flowing across the frame. The reflections partially obscure her face, creating a dreamy double-exposure effect. Warm golden-hour sunlight gently cuts across sections of her face and glossy hair while the café interior remains dark and atmospheric.
Intimate candid composition, subject looking sideways or subtly toward the camera, natural unposed body language, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, realistic glass scratches and faint dust, soft lens flare, subtle highlight bloom, cool blue reflections mixed with warm amber tones, rich blacks, cinematic color grading, 85mm lens, f/1.4, Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, soft halation, natural skin texture, poetic urban solitude, luxury fashion editorial meets documentary street photography, photorealistic, vertical 4:5, no text, no watermark.
promptZh:
超电影感特写肖像，拍摄一位坐在昏暗城市咖啡馆内的年轻女性，从室外透过巨大的反光玻璃窗拍摄。她留着利落的 下巴长度黑色波波头，中分发型，几缕柔顺的发丝自然垂落在脸颊上，肤色白皙真实并带有细微雀斑，浅灰绿色双眸，双唇自然柔和，妆容极简，神情安静、疏离且忧郁。她身着 优雅的全黑套装，配有黑色透视袖子。
她的面容隐约可见于多层玻璃倒影之下：路过车辆的蓝色光带、模糊的城市建筑、温暖的橙色灯光、街道轮廓以及抽象的城市形状在画面中流转。倒影部分遮挡了她的面部，营造出梦幻般的多重曝光效果。温暖的黄金时刻阳光柔和地切过她的脸庞和光泽秀发，而咖啡馆内部则保持着昏暗且充满氛围感的状态。
亲密的抓拍构图，主体侧视或微妙地看向镜头，自然的非摆拍肢体语言，浅景深，奶油般虚化，真实的玻璃划痕和微尘，柔和的镜头光晕，细腻的高光溢出，冷蓝色倒影与暖琥珀色调交织，浓郁的黑色，电影级调色，85mm 镜头，f/1.4，Kodak Portra 400 胶片美学，细腻的 35mm 颗粒感，柔和的光晕，真实的皮肤质感，诗意的城市孤独感，奢华时尚杂志与纪实街头摄影的结合，照片级真实，竖构图 4:5，无文字，无水印。
